title: orobanche multicaulis var. genuina
intro: Orobanche multicaulis var. genuina, also known as the two-leafed broomrape, is a parasitic flowering plant that belongs to the Orobanchaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to induce abortion and its use as an emetic. The health benefits of Orobanche multicaulis var. genuina include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in infusions or decoctions, although its use should be approached with caution due to its potential side effects.
